summary: Lead accepts M3 postwar governance after writer R5, systems_architect R5 ACCEPT, and independent qa_reviewer R5 ACCEPT. The implementation stays within the task allowed paths, adds explicit direct-control, restore-vassal-ruler, and tribute-only governance arrangements, exposes immediate preview and 24-month comparison queries, records auditable reason codes, uses explicit GameCommand/event paths for mutation, rejects repeated same-district arrangements before mutation across same-victor, different-victor, localPolityId bypass, and direct-control-first cases, and avoids implementing M4 campaign, march, battle, supply, siege, treaty, or full diplomacy systems.

tests_run.command: validate-handoff for all M3-POSTWAR-GOVERNANCE-001 outbox handoffs
tests_run.result: All writer, systems, QA, and reviewer-loop handoffs validate successfully.
Task id, ACCEPTED status, lead route, all child thread ids, allowed paths, forbidden paths, and required tests are present.
No authority-breaking random or real-time usage found; rg returns 1 for no matches.

tests_run.command: rg -n framework/fs import search in packages/sim-core packages/protocol
tests_run.result: No React, Pixi, Electron, fs, or node:fs import matches.
No campaign, march, siege, supply, reinforcement, battle, treaty, full diplomacy, rebellion, or legitimacy implementation matches in touched implementation/test surfaces.
Node and worker-compatible hashes matched for hello 61e0ba1c, command/query d275faa4, and save/load 28074edd; save/load byte length 10920.
Architecture boundaries passed; root Vitest 24 files/157 tests passed; web Vitest 1 file/3 tests passed.
format:check, lint, typecheck, and architecture:check passed.

decisions: ACCEPT: Direct-control, restore-vassal-ruler, and tribute-only governance methods satisfy the M3 prototype boundary without starting the M4 war loop.
ACCEPT: Same-district postwar arrangements are single-assignment in M3; replacement semantics require a future explicit task.
ACCEPT: Direct-control persistence uses a district-keyed condition-based defensive-garrison marker with zero nominal/due/arrears accounting so it records governance without creating resources.
ACCEPT: 24-month outcome projection coefficients remain M3 validation constants and are not final balance.
risks: Direct-control postwar persistence uses an existing obligation marker rather than a first-class postwar arrangement table. Future replacement or retirement semantics should be designed separately before allowing replacement.
Projection coefficients remain M3 prototype validation constants, not final balance.
Existing MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning remains in the deterministic RNG worker fixture and is not introduced by this task.
requested_action: Commit, push, create PR, wait for CI, merge to main, sync main, then mark M3-POSTWAR-GOVERNANCE-001 CLOSED and continue to the next READY M3 task.
